name: pulseplay-playground
description: PulsePlay — multi-BI playground host. React app that hosts ANY BI tool (Power BI, Tableau, Qlik, Looker, …) as an iframe / SDK / web-component guest, with the AI assistant sidebar reasoning across whichever is currently active.

comments._intentional_omission: powerbi-client / tableau-api-js / qlik-embed are NOT root dependencies. Each lives in bi-adapters/<vendor>/ and gets installed only if/when that adapter is wired in. Keeps the playground core vendor-neutral and the bundle small for BI tools the deployer doesn't use.
